hero.headline:
Find Hidden Leaks Without
the Destruction
hero.subheadline: Your property is too valuable for guesswork. American Leak Detection of Sacramento uses advanced, non-invasive technology to pinpoint leaks under slabs, in pools, and behind walls -- so you get answers fast without tearing up your home.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Leak Detection & Repair That<br class="hidden md:block"> Protects Your Property
services.subtitle: From pools to sewer lines, slabs to sprinklers -- we find leaks other companies miss. Our non-destructive technology means no unnecessary digging, no guesswork, and no surprises.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Leak Detection
cards.description: Expert detection and repair of leaks in swimming pools, spas, and water features using non-invasive technology that pinpoints the exact location without excavation.

cards.title: Slab & Foundation Leaks
cards.description: Hidden leaks beneath concrete slabs cause costly structural damage. Our advanced acoustic and electronic equipment finds them fast -- before the damage spreads.

cards.title: Sewer Line Detection & Repair
cards.description: Non-destructive identification and repair of damaged sewer lines. We minimize disruption to your property while resolving drainage and sewage issues completely.

cards.title: Irrigation System Leaks
cards.description: Underground irrigation leaks cause high water bills and landscape damage. Our precision equipment locates the exact leak point so repairs are quick and targeted.

cards.title: Mystery Leak Investigation
cards.description: Unexplained water damage, moisture, or mold? We use state-of-the-art non-invasive detection technology to find the source when nobody else can.

cards.title: High Water Bill Analysis
cards.description: Skyrocketing water bill with no explanation? We conduct a comprehensive plumbing investigation to find and fix the hidden leaks draining your wallet.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Leak-Free Peace of Mind

steps.title: Call for Your Assessment
steps.description: Describe your concern -- rising water bill, damp spot, pool losing water. We'll schedule a convenient appointment, often within the same week.

steps.title: We Detect & Diagnose
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive with advanced electronic and acoustic equipment. We pinpoint the exact leak location non-destructively -- no tearing up your property.

steps.title: Repair & Restore
steps.description: Once located, we handle the repair on the spot whenever possible. You get a complete solution from detection through restoration, all from one trusted team.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Rooted, Nationally Backed
about.description: As the fifth American Leak Detection franchise ever established in the USA, we have been protecting Sacramento-area properties since 1983. Family-owned and operated from our Roseville headquarters, we combine four decades of proprietary detection technology with the personal care of a local business. Our licensed technicians treat your home like their own -- because this is our community too.

features.title: Non-Destructive Technology
features.description: Our proprietary electronic and acoustic equipment finds leaks without tearing up floors, walls, or landscaping. Precise results, minimal disruption.

features.title: 40+ Years of Expertise
features.description: One of the first ALD franchises in the nation. Four decades of specialized leak detection experience means we find what others miss.

features.title: Detection Through Repair
features.description: We do not just find the leak and leave. Our team handles the complete repair so you get one company, one call, one solution.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprise Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with an honest assessment. We explain what we find, what it costs, and you decide -- no pressure, no hidden charges.

guarantee.headline: Our "Find It or It's Free" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If we cannot locate your leak using our non-destructive detection methods, you do not pay for the detection service. We stand behind our 40+ years of technology and expertise with a guarantee that puts your confidence first. That is how certain we are in our ability to find it.

faqs.question: How does non-destructive leak detection work?
faqs.answer: We use advanced electronic and acoustic equipment developed over 40+ years to listen for and pinpoint leaks through walls, under slabs, and in pool structures -- all without digging or demolition. It is precise, fast, and preserves your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you come out for a leak inspection?
faqs.answer: Most appointments are scheduled within the same week. For urgent situations like active water damage or rapidly rising bills, we prioritize faster response. Call us and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you repair the leak after finding it?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle both detection and repair so you get a complete solution from one company. Most repairs can be completed on the same visit, saving you time and the hassle of coordinating multiple contractors.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve nine counties across the greater Sacramento region: Sacramento, Placer, El Dorado, Yolo, Sutter, Yuba, Butte, Nevada, and Sierra Counties. Our Roseville headquarters puts us within easy reach of the entire area.

faqs.question: Can you detect leaks in swimming pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool and spa leak detection is one of our core specialties. We use non-invasive methods to find leaks in pool shells, plumbing lines, and equipment without draining the pool or tearing up your deck.

testimonials.name: Dana M. R.
testimonials.text: Max, Jeremy and Maureen were WONDERFUL! Maureen scheduled a quick appointment and Max and Jeremy were courteous and informative about diagnosing where the leaks were occurring. If you are having leak or plumbing issues, American Leak Detection is the company to call. 5-Stars.

testimonials.name: Daniele R.
testimonials.text: Found and fixed what seemed impossible to locate. Max was thorough with detection and performed professional repair work that resolved a persistent leak issue under our living room slab after other companies failed.

testimonials.name: David P.
testimonials.text: Jeremy is a superb technician -- professional, knowledgeable, accurate, and straight-forward. He worked through 104-degree heat non-stop to isolate and fix unknown leaks while explaining the process clearly. Outstanding.

contact.headline:
Suspect a Hidden Leak?
Get Answers Fast.
contact.subtitle: Schedule your non-destructive leak detection today. We will pinpoint the problem, explain your options, and handle the repair -- all without tearing up your property.

footer.description: Family-owned leak detection serving the greater Sacramento area since 1983.
footer.service_area: Serving Sacramento, Placer, El Dorado, Yolo & 5 More Counties
